/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/livepaperd.dir/livepaperd_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livepaperd.dir/daemon/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livepaperd.dir/daemon/daemon/LivePaperDaemon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livepaperd.dir/daemon/renderer/MpvRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livepaperd.dir/daemon/ipc/DBusServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livepaperd.dir/daemon/wayland/WaylandLayer.cpp.o -o livepaperd  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6DBus.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
